run_summary.summary: 🚨 Gmail auth error — Brandi couldn't scan email this run. The Gmail OAuth refresh token returned `invalid_grant`, meaning it's been revoked or expired. No emails were scanned and no deals were updated. To fix: re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access (re-run the OAuth flow to get a new refresh token).

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth token is invalid (invalid_grant). Brandi needs a new refresh token to resume scanning. Re-run the OAuth authorization flow and update the refresh_token in Brandi's scheduled run config.
